dashboard.intro: Your shared family kitchen. Digitizing generations of family secrets, one card at a time.
dashboard.scan_desc: Digitize physical recipe cards instantly with AI.
dashboard.planner_desc: Organize your family meals for the week ahead.
dashboard.no_recipes: No recipes yet. Start by scanning one!
dashboard.unauthorized_msg: Please log in to see your family's recent recipes.

recipe_form.scan_prompt: Upload a photo of your recipe card
recipe_form.scan_subtext: We'll use AI to extract the ingredients and steps for you.
recipe_form.processing_sub: Converting your photo into a digital master.
recipe_form.error_scan: We couldn't read the image. Please try another photo or enter details manually.

auth.login_subtitle: Sign in to access your family's secret vault.
auth.register_subtitle: Start digitizing and sharing your favorite meals.

planner.title: Weekly Meal Planner
planner.subtitle: Family dinner menu for the week of {date}
planner.no_plan: No plan for this week yet.
planner.no_plan_sub: Click the button above to generate a balanced menu from your family vault.
